title: Add MCP client driver and tool for external MCP server integration
goal: MCP 프로토콜 클라이언트를 추가하여 외부 MCP 서버(Google Calendar, Gmail 등)에 연결하고 tool을 호출할 수 있게 한다. tool registry에 mcp tool을 등록하여 오케스트레이터가 MCP tool을 실행할 수 있게 한다.

test_requirements.case: MCP tool run with valid server and tool name
MCP tool run with unknown server
MCP tool run with unknown tool name
MCP tool is registered in tool registry

test_requirements.expected: connection status is configurable, not planned

test_requirements.case: MCP client list_tools returns tool descriptions

constraints: Use the mcp Python package (pip install mcp) for protocol handling if available, otherwise implement minimal JSON-RPC over stdio/SSE
MCP tool must follow BaseTool interface: run(params) -> {success, data, error}
Do not modify existing tools or plugins
Do not import from gateway/ inside tools/
MCP server configs stored via config_store, not hardcoded
The tool must work even if no MCP servers are configured (return helpful error)
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
